artPrompt: A widescreen noir film-still of a brutal alley clash, two goblin crews colliding in silhouette amid swinging fists and falling bodies under a flickering amber lamp, a hunched goblin at the foreground edge calmly marking a clipboard while violence rages behind; rain-slick brick gleams, cigar haze and gunsmoke hang thick, ink-black shadows devouring the carnage, intimate menace and ledgers, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Turf War
text: All creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn. For each creature that dies this turn, you create a Favor token. Somebody's family is going to owe somebody an apology, and apologies aren't free.
flavorText: Two crews, one alley, no survivors, and a goblin with a clipboard tallying who owes what.
